summary: First-run end-to-end testing of Avi Bhardwaj personal portfolio. Backend (7 pytest cases) and frontend (desktop + mobile flows via Playwright) all pass. /api/health returns ok with resend_configured=false (intentional). /api/contact POST persists to MongoDB and returns status='received', delivered=false (as expected, no RESEND_API_KEY). Validation 422s for invalid email, missing message, missing/empty name. GET /api/contact returns the persisted record without Mongo _id. Frontend home renders header brand, hero (Engineering Manager at PaisaBazaar), and all six sections. Nav links + Hero CTA scroll correctly. Contact form: empty submit shows toast, valid submit shows success banner + sonner toast and resets the form on both desktop and mobile (390x844). No horizontal scroll on mobile. Hero LinkedIn CTA href is correct. Zero console errors.

issues: Mobile menu link buttons in Header.jsx (About/Experience/Skills/Projects/Writing/Contact) do not carry data-testid attributes (only the desktop nav buttons do). The mobile toggle has nav-mobile-toggle but child links rely on text content for selection. Consider reusing NAV.* test ids on the mobile list items for symmetric testability.

action_items: (Optional) Add data-testid to mobile menu link buttons in Header.jsx using the existing NAV constants for symmetric desktop/mobile test coverage.
When RESEND_API_KEY is provided later, re-test /api/contact to confirm status='sent' and delivered=true.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py correctly excludes Mongo _id via projection in GET /api/contact — good.
POST /api/contact returns 200 with status='received' when no Resend key — matches problem statement (do not flag).
EmailStr validation works (422 on bad email).
Resend call is wrapped with asyncio.to_thread (non-blocking) — good.
Frontend uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL with /api prefix — correct.
Header mobile menu duplicates the link list — minor DRY opportunity but acceptable; missing data-testid on mobile copies is the only testability gap.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Test contact submissions inserted into MongoDB collection 'contact_messages' with TEST_ prefixes (TEST_User, TEST_Mobile, TEST UI User). Safe to delete by filter {name: /^TEST/}.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_portfolio_api.py. RESEND_API_KEY is intentionally empty — backend returning delivered=false / status='received' is correct, NOT a bug. When the key is provided, update TestContactPost.test_post_valid_payload_received to assert status='sent' and delivered=true.
rca of the issue: No bugs found — MVP build is functioning per spec.
